The International School of Penang (Upla.philosophy: Relationship-centred, inquiry-based learning. IB World School (PYP/IGCSE/DP). Motto: Respect for Self, Respect for Others.
The International School of Penang (Upla.other_fees: Application RM800, Entrance RM2,000, Deposit RM5,000 (refundable), Dev Fund RM2,500/yr. 5% early-pay discount, 10%/20% sibling discount.
The International School of Penang (Upla.top_nationalities: Broadly international; Chinese, Korean, Malaysian well-represented

Dalat International School.brand: Independent interdenominational trust (founded 1929 in Vietnam, relocated Penang 1971)
Dalat International School.philosophy: Education for Life - American curriculum with Biblical worldview. Whole-child development (intellectual, social, physical, moral). WASC & ACSI Exemplary accreditation.
Dalat International School.other_fees: Application RM800, Test RM300, Registration RM2,000-5,000, Deposit RM1,500. Boarding (Gr6-12) RM43,040/yr.
Dalat International School.top_nationalities: Malaysian (~1/3), American, Korean; historically missionary/expat families

Prince of Wales Island International Sch.brand: MTT Learning Academy Sdn Bhd (MTT Group). FOBISIA member.
Prince of Wales Island International Sch.philosophy: British National Curriculum enriched with local/international perspectives. Student-centred approach integrating academics, creativity, and well-being. Strong boarding tradition.
Prince of Wales Island International Sch.other_fees: Assessment RM1,000, Registration RM5,000, Deposit RM5,000-18,000. Boarding: RM39,600/yr (full), RM31,500/yr (weekday). 3.5% annual payment discount.
Prince of Wales Island International Sch.top_nationalities: Broadly international; 85% of faculty from UK

Prince of Wales Island International Sch.brand: MTT Learning Academy Sdn Bhd (MTT Group). FOBISIA member.
Prince of Wales Island International Sch.philosophy: British National Curriculum enriched with local/international perspectives. Student-centred approach integrating academics, creativity, and well-being.
Prince of Wales Island International Sch.other_fees: Assessment RM1,000, Registration RM5,000, Deposit RM5,000-18,000. 3.5% annual payment discount.
Prince of Wales Island International Sch.top_nationalities: Broadly international; 85% of faculty from UK

Stonyhurst International School Penang.brand: Stonyhurst College, UK (Jesuit, founded 1593). Penang campus opened Sept 2022.
Stonyhurst International School Penang.philosophy: Jesuit tradition of cura personalis (care for the whole person). Motto: Quant Je Puis (As much as I can). Individual learning coaches; strong co-curricular and service emphasis.
Stonyhurst International School Penang.other_fees: Application RM1,000, Enrolment RM5,000-8,500, Deposit RM5,000 (refundable). 3% early-pay, 3-8% sibling discount. SST 6% on fees >RM60K from Jul 2025.

Straits International School Penang.brand: International Schools Partnership (ISP) - 65+ schools in 19 countries. Acquired 2021.
Straits International School Penang.philosophy: Growing, Together - personalised international education amplifying each learner's unique talents. Enhanced British/Cambridge curriculum. Trilingual (English, Malay, Mandarin).
Straits International School Penang.other_fees: Application RM1,600. Sibling 7% (2nd), 10% (3rd+). 5% full-year payment discount. No Y12-13.

Tenby Schools Penang.brand: International Schools Partnership (ISP, since 2018). Dual-stream: International + Malaysian National (Sri Tenby).
Tenby Schools Penang.philosophy: Amazing schools are defined by their people. Dual-stream model promoting multicultural understanding and bilingual capability. Strong STEAM focus with dedicated STEAM building.
Tenby Schools Penang.other_fees: Application RM500, Registration RM3,500, Deposit 0.5 term, Tech/Learning RM1,400/yr. No Y12-13 in international stream.

St Christopher's International School (S.brand: Independent, not-for-profit. FOBISIA member since 1989. BSO inspected.
St Christopher's International School (S.philosophy: Broad, balanced British-based curriculum (IPC & UK Foundation Stage) for a diverse international community. Values: friendship, respect, trust, integrity. Non-denominational.
St Christopher's International School (S.other_fees: Application/Registration RM1,500-3,500, Dev Fee RM500/yr, Deposit = 1 term tuition (refundable). 4% full-year discount. Ends at Year 8.
St Christopher's International School (S.top_nationalities: 50% Malaysian / 50% international. British, Australian, Indian, Chinese ~10% each. Korean notable.

Pelita International School.brand: Pelita Schools Group (private, founded 1999). Cambridge International partner.
Pelita International School.philosophy: Howard Gardner's Multiple Intelligences framework. Holistic education with EQ as dedicated subject alongside IQ. Experiential and fun learning combining kinaesthetic activities with real-life scenarios.
Pelita International School.other_fees: Application RM300, Registration RM1,000-3,500, Deposit = 1 term. No A-Level/IB DP. Ends at Year 11.
Pelita International School.top_nationalities: Not publicly disclosed; likely majority Malaysian/SE Asian

Fairview International School Penang.brand: Fairview International PLC (London Stock Exchange, listed Oct 2024). 5 campuses in Malaysia + 1 in Scotland.
Fairview International School Penang.philosophy: Fully IB World School (PYP + MYP). Only Penang school authorized for both PYP and MYP. Develops internationally minded, inquiring learners through critical thinking and intercultural understanding.
Fairview International School Penang.other_fees: Application RM1,000, Enrolment RM2,500 (PYP)/RM5,000 (MYP). Deposit = 1 semester. No IB DP at Penang campus (PYP+MYP only, ages 3-16).
Fairview International School Penang.top_nationalities: Not disclosed per campus; 55+ nationalities across all Fairview campuses
